reviews.text: We LOVED working with the Scobeys. From our first meeting through the wedding day, they were kind, honest, and professional. Their pricing was upfront and we never felt pressured to purchase a more expensive package. They asked us lots of questions to get to know us and what our priorities were for our wedding day. They also helped us figure out the timeline for our wedding day. On our wedding day, Ashley was amazing to work with. She led our rambunctious family through some massive family portraits in a quick and efficient, yet natural and fun way. My husband and I were a little nervous about all the pictures/video that were going to be taken at the wedding. We didn't want to spend too much time doing that, as we thought it wasn't going to be the best way to spend our (very little) time during the wedding. Ashley totally changed our minds - she made it so that our time taking pictures just felt like quality, 1:1 time with each other. We felt some of our most relaxed and connected moments while we were outside taking pictures with Ashley. We got all of our photos back very quickly - within a couple weeks - and they are BEAUTIFUL. We love the Scobeys and will absolutely use them in the future for family shoots.

The one thing people told us when giving advice about wedding planning was that they regretted not having a better photographer. We do not share this regret!! The Scobeys are unbelievably good at what they do. This was one area we were willing to splurge a bit, especially when we looked at their website and portfolio, and it was so worth it. Their talent is unmatched. Not only that, they’re so friendly and easy to talk to, and so helpful when you have questions or ideas to think through. And the pictures they took? Oh man–they are beautiful! Our favorite memory with them was going into a state park with Graham at closing to take golden hour photos by our venue–what an adventure! The lighting and colors are perfect and these folks can honestly make anyone look like their best selves. We loved the Scobeys!

Ashley is amazing! She helped our day run smoothly, and made us feel comfortable and confident despite the wedding day jitters. Our pictures are absolutely beautiful, and we even got them back less than 2 weeks after our wedding! I especially liked the way she was able to get so many great candid shots without us even noticing she was there.
